text.tspan: Parallel Reduction: Shared Memory Access Pattern
// Stride reduces by half each iteration

g.text: for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 0; s >>= 1) {

text.tspan: // Stride reduces by half each iteration

ul.li: Addressing: sdata[i] maps to hardware bank index (i % 32).
Stride=8: Thread k accesses bank k and bank (k+8).
Conflict Check: Since k and (k+8) are in different banks for all k < 32, no bank conflicts occur.
Warp Divergence: The if(tid < s) condition causes divergence.
Syncthreads: Prevents RAW hazards between iterations.
